clauses.obligation: Grant of single-location franchise to operate restaurant at specified location under System and Marks
clauses.restriction: Must operate only from Location; must commence within 60 days of Effective Date; must provide 14 days' prior notice of opening date

clauses.obligation: Renewal available if all conditions met: written notice 4-12 months before term end; no material default; sign then-current FA (may differ); franchisor still operating in state; approved location; pay renewal fee; general release; training
clauses.restriction: Renewal FA may contain materially different terms
clauses.exceptions: 30-day grace period if notice not timely received

clauses.obligation: Royalty 5% of Net Sales; Digital Fee 2% of digital Net Sales; Marketing Fund 6%; auto-debit authorization required
clauses.restriction: Royalty may increase up to 6% if new FA rate matches

clauses.obligation: Franchise terminates immediately without cure for: bankruptcy, unsatisfied judgment, dissolution, attachment, cease operations, lose possession, unpermitted transfer, criminal conviction, failure to transfer after death within 9 months, confidential info disclosure, repeated defaults, noncompete violation, false books, uninsured, Marks impairment, public health danger, government noncompliance (15-day cure)

30-day cure period for: failure to construct/operate, failure to pay, unauthorized transfer of 5% or less interest, misuse of Marks, health/safety violations (72-hour cure), lease breach, manual noncompliance, failure to complete training, failure to comply with standards
On termination for franchisee default (including abandonment): pay liquidated damages = average monthly royalty for prior 12 months × lesser of 24 or months remaining in term
clauses.restriction: Not charged if franchisor approves closure under Store Closing Policy
clauses.money: Formula: avg monthly royalty × min(24, months remaining)

clauses.obligation: No involvement in any competing business anywhere during term

For 2 years after transfer/termination/expiration: no interest in competing business within 10-mile radius of (1) the Restaurant, or (2) any Papa Johns restaurant operated by franchisor/affiliate/franchisee
clauses.restriction: Covers employment, investment, consulting, any capacity. Exception: ownership of ≤1% of publicly traded securities

clauses.obligation: All transfers require prior written consent. Conditions: compliance, qualified transferee, amounts paid, training, current FA, release, landlord consent
clauses.restriction: Any transfer of interest in agreement, assets, or entity (including PO interest)
clauses.exceptions: Transfers among existing shareholders/members/partners require only 30 days prior written notice

clauses.obligation: Franchisor has right to match any bona fide third-party offer for the franchise or its assets
clauses.trigger: Receipt of bona fide third-party offer

clauses.obligation: On termination or expiration, franchisor may purchase all restaurant assets at FMV (excluding real property, Marks goodwill, going-concern value, proprietary software). Exercise within 15 days.
clauses.money: Fair market value determined by independent appraisal if parties cannot agree. Three-appraiser process if single appraiser not agreed.

clauses.obligation: Franchise must be assigned to approved buyer within 9 months of death/incapacity/dissolution of franchisee or owner
clauses.restriction: If not effected within 9 months, constitutes non-curable default

clauses.obligation: Franchisee must hold harmless, defend and indemnify franchisor, affiliates, and their officers/directors/agents/employees from all losses, expenses, judgments, claims, costs (including attorney fees) arising from franchisee's construction or operation of restaurant
Binding arbitration in Louisville, KY before AAA, one arbitrator, under commercial arbitration rules. Governed by Federal Arbitration Act.
clauses.exceptions: Carve-outs: (1) public health/safety actions, (2) debt collection (except coop contributions), (3) at claimant's option: §16/17/20(a)(x) violations or post-expiration Mark use
clauses.restriction: Individual basis only — no class-wide or consolidated arbitration. No exemplary or punitive damages. Compulsory counterclaim rule applies.
Unless prohibited by laws of state where Restaurant is located

clauses.obligation: $1M each occurrence combined single limit; $1M personal injury; $1M products-completed operations aggregate; $2M general aggregate; $500K fire legal liability; $1M auto combined single limit; $1M umbrella minimum. Must name franchisor as additional insured. 30-day cancellation notice.
clauses.restriction: Franchisor may increase limits at any time

clauses.obligation: Franchisor has security interest in all personal property, furnishings, equipment, signs, fixtures and inventory on premises as of termination date, until all amounts owed are paid

clauses.section: Not expressly found in standard FA
clauses.obligation: No express force majeure clause identified in the standard Franchise Agreement
